---
title: "Soundscapes along tropical forest gradients"
image: "../images/card_pics/spectro.jpg"
description: "We map how biodiversity and human disturbance shape forest soundscapes. Acoustic data provide an integrative measure of ecosystem health and biotic change across tropical gradients."
categories: ["Deep Tropics Project"]
contributors: "Erin Stewart"
feature_order: "NA"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
